response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in fintech and AI, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and engineering leadership at the required scale.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise
Proven track record of scaling engineering projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture
Not enough experience in fintech infrastructure
Limited experience in engineering leadership at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
